3064130.name: Missilesaber
3064130.description:
Game Overview

- This game has very simple rules: you control a missile with a glowing sword attached to it and slash all the red balls in the stage.

- However, if the missile hits something, it will explode and the game will be over.

- Enjoy the thrilling game of getting as close as possible and hitting only with your sword.


Game Contents

- 10 stages in total

- After clearing the tutorial stage, you can return to the title screen to proceed to the stage selection screen.

- Xbox controller recommended, keyboard operation also supported


Earning ★

- Every stage has a time limit for earning ★.

- You can earn ★ by clearing it within the time limit.

- Collecting 10 ★ is the true clear.

- After earning, return to the title screen to become a gold rocket.
